purpose: Read + write secrets in a specific Key Vault
env_var: AZURE_KEYVAULT_NAME (vault name resolved by az CLI; auth via az login or managed identity)

minimum_scope.description: Use RBAC role assignments at the Key Vault scope (NOT subscription scope). Create a dedicated service principal or managed identity for kit and assign the two built-in roles below.
minimum_scope.auth_recommendation: Managed Identity > Service Principal > User credentials. Use the lowest-privilege account that works for your runtime.

rbac_assignments.note: Only assign if kit needs to WRITE secrets. Drop this if kit is read-only against the vault.

minimum_scope.network_acl: Restrict the vault firewall to known runner IPs
minimum_scope.soft_delete: Ensure soft-delete is enabled on the vault for accidental-delete recovery
